title: Guess What’s in the Box?
description: The rules are simple. We’ll show you a box and you must guess what’s inside! Answer correctly, and you’ll win whatever’s in the box.
quote: I want to change my answer! I think it’s a giant jelly bean too!
altHero: Mr. Nosey and Mr. Small jumping out of a mystery box
alt1: Mr. Nosey and Mr. Small present a curtain
alt2: hosts with three contestants next to a giant mystery box
alt4: they reveal a donkey was in the mystery box
